title: Buried Wrecks
description: A mod that adds buried shipwrecks to the underground
body:
Have you ever thought to yourself "Minecraft caves are lacking something". Have you ever been in a conversation with others and said "Ya know, I really wish Shipwrecks could be underground!". Well, this mod is for you!

Buried Wrecks will generate shipwreck structures underground and enhance your gaming experience. Using the configs, this mod allows you to specify what Y level a separate Shipwreck structure will spawn. If you're using datapacks, you can configure this mod even further. Don't worry though! Vanilla Shipwrecks can still generate on the surface so you can have both! This mod uses vanilla Shipwreck loot tables so you can even find some useful items while spelunking!

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
